{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged Blackflame
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] forms claws of [[Forged Blackflame]] [[madra]] on his fingers.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
